TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Pilifet_to_fana'_to_suwal_no_Yincumincu, title = Pilifet_to_fana'_to_suwal_no_Yincumincu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pilifet_to_fana'_to_suwal_no_Yincumincu} }

S.FORM: == Pilifet to fana' to suwal no Yincumincu == Iti:ya ho , misafacalho ko matoa'say , ano misanga' to lalan no salananoman no omah i , nanitira i tatapangan no tukus a misitapang a palafanaw , ta misulinga' to a mikarkar a misakengkeng a miropay to halalan no nanom a sera, do^do han nangra ko 'apilis no 'alo ato tono' a misalalan . ano taharifa to 'ongcoy i , ano awa'ay to ko pakayraan to halalan i , makakutakutay a mipehpeh toya 'ongcoy ato mi'orong a mifalah toya napehpehan a fakeloh,caayay katalaw cangra to cidal ato 'orad , caayay karorayen cangra to romi'ami'ad a tayal , tangasa i kanga'ayan no nanom a romakat , ta palaheci a misalalan tangasa i omaomahan. Mahaenay ko pinangan no mato'asay no mita itiya:ay ho, a mapapalipaliw a madadadama a miliyaw a miliyaw ko demak nangra , ta ira ko kakaenen no mita i matini . 'Araw han no mita i matini , pakayniay i pipalowad to sowal ato tilid no Yen-Cu-Ming-Cu hananay a demak i , saka lima to a mihecaan a milifet to fana' to sowal no Yen-Cu-Ming-Cu , malowan a malowan ko panganganay a finacadan a miseking , maserer a maserer ko pakalifetay to fana', i tini sca i mitiliday ho i pitilidan a kaemangay no mita mahaen aca , o haharatengen no mita ko mahaenay a demak a misakimokimor a mikingkiw. O Yen-Cu-Ming-Cu Wot-Yen-Hoy no mita i , so'elin to , adihayay to ko naikoran no demak nangra , pakayni i pipalowad to serangawan no mita , caayay to katararikor ko faloco' ato pinangan nangra , tadamihayi kako to nidemakan nangra , nikaorira , o maherekay to , o pakalifetay to fana' to sowal no Yen-Cu-Ming-Cu , o malapasifana'ay to i pitilidan a finacadan , caayay katangasa ko pirikec ko patanoktok no Yen-Cu-Ming-Cu Woy-Yen-Hoy no mita , do^do saan tono nisetekan no Ciyaw-I-Pu a demak , caayayho pakamuecel pakalifet to hahademaken i tini a mipa'ading to salongoc no Yen-Cu-Ming-Cu to kioyiku , awaayay ko no niyah a 'icel a lalan a misolinga' a patireng to hamamamidiput to pasifana'ay i pitilidan . O tomirengay i 'a'ayaw no kioyiko i pitilidan , i niyaro' i , o pasifana'ay , nengneng han ko sifo no Taywan , cango'otay ko pipa'adingan , cango'otay ko palaheciay to salongoc i kalodemak , cango'otay ko solinga' no paca'ofay to ngiha no i 'a'ayaway a pasifana'ay , o kasiniada'an to ko tireng ato paro no loma' ato 'orip no pasifana'ay . Misacikacikay cangra a mirawod to konkoan , kalihanawan to ko rakat i lalalalan to romi'ami'ad , i tatokian tangasa i pipasifana'an a konkoan a pasifana' to tilid ato suwal no Yin-Cu-Ming-Cu i wawawawaan sa no mita , o itiraay to i pitilidan a singsi no Taywan i , caay ka i mata nangra ko pasifana'ay no Yin-Cu-Ming-Cu , ci faloco' cangra o Yin-Cu-Ming:-Cu i saan , caayay kamipadang a misa'op a mi'ocol to wawa no Yin-Cu-Ming-Cu a papinanam , oratek i mafu'ot no singsi nangra i pitilidan , o latek i malata'ocoran no singsi nangra a matayal , o roma i o miundoay ko wawa no mita i pitilidan , cecay a lipay sepat a polo'no tatokian ko pinanaman no wawa no mita i , matatodung to mahaenay a demak i , icu:waho a minanam ko wawa no mita , pakayni i tilid , pakayni i suwal , pakayni i serangawan , ci faloco'ci cedi aca ko malopasifana'ay no mita a midemak,'araw han awa saca ko pitadiecan sano pakuyoc sato ko pasifana'ay no Yin-Cu-Ming-Cu i pitilidan , ano itini aca i niyaro' i , mahaenay aca ko faloco' no mama ato ina no wawa no mita . Nanay haenen no mita ko 'icel no faloco' ita a midodo^ to pisalananom no mato'asay iti:yaho, ko pidemak no mita to rayray a demak no Yin-Cu-Ming-Cu , ta nanitera' talatolis malasacingacinga ta awaay to ko malawaay a dademaken , o kasapaanto no Taywan a tamdaw kita .
S.PHON: == pi…ĺif…ôt to~u fana ° to~u so~u~uwa…ĺ no~u jin ¶o~u~umin ¶o~u~u == iti:ja ńßo~u , misafa ¶a…ĺńßo~u ko~u mato~ua °saj , ano~u misaŇča ° to~u …ĺa…ĺan no~u sa…ĺanano~uman no~u o~umańß i , nanitira i tatapaŇčan no~u to~u~uko~u~us a misitapaŇč a pa…ĺafanaw , ta miso~u~u…ĺiŇča ° to~u a mikarkar a misak…ôŇčk…ôŇč a miro~upaj to~u ńßa…ĺa…ĺan no~u nano~um a s…ôra, …¨~…ģo~u Ē…¨~…ģo~u ńßan naŇčra ko~u °api…ĺis no~u °a…ĺo~u ato~u to~uno~u ° a misa…ĺa…ĺan . ano~u tańßarifa to~u °o~uŇč ¶o~uj i , ano~u awa °aj to~u ko~u pakajraan to~u ńßa…ĺa…ĺan i , makako~u~utako~u~utaj a mip…ôńßp…ôńß to~uja °o~uŇč ¶o~uj ato~u mi °o~uro~uŇč a mifa…ĺańß to~uja nap…ôńßp…ôńßan a fak…ô…ĺo~uńß, ¶aajaj kata…ĺaw ¶aŇčra to~u ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ ato~u °o~ura…¨~…ģ , ¶aajaj karo~uraj…ôn ¶aŇčra to~u ro~umi °ami °a…¨~…ģ a taja…ĺ , taŇčasa i kaŇča °ajan no~u nano~um a ro~umakat , ta pa…ĺańß…ô ¶i a misa…ĺa…ĺan taŇčasa i o~umao~umańßan. mańßa…ônaj ko~u pinaŇčan no~u mato~u °asaj no~u mita itija:aj ńßo~u, a mapapa…ĺipa…ĺiw a ma…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģama a mi…ĺijaw a mi…ĺijaw ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak naŇčra , ta ira ko~u kaka…ôn…ôn no~u mita i matini . °araw ńßan no~u mita i matini , pakajniaj i pipa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u so~uwa…ĺ ato~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ no~u j…ôn- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u ńßananaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak i , saka …ĺima to~u a mińß…ô ¶aan a mi…ĺif…ôt to~u fana ° to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u j…ôn- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u , ma…ĺo~uwan a ma…ĺo~uwan ko~u paŇčaŇčanaj a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan a mis…ôkiŇč , mas…ôr…ôr a mas…ôr…ôr ko~u paka…ĺif…ôtaj to~u fana °, i tini s ¶a i miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj ńßo~u i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan a ka…ômaŇčaj no~u mita mańßa…ôn a ¶a , o~u ńßańßarat…ôŇč…ôn no~u mita ko~u mańßa…ônaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak a misakimo~ukimo~ur a mikiŇčkiw. o~u j…ôn- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u wo~ut-j…ôn-ńßo~uj no~u mita i , so~u °…ô…ĺin to~u , a…¨~…ģińßajaj to~u ko~u naiko~uran no~u …¨~…ģ…ômak naŇčra , pakajni i pipa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u s…ôraŇčawan no~u mita , ¶aajaj to~u katarariko~ur ko~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ato~u pinaŇčan naŇčra , ta…¨~…ģamińßaji kako~u to~u ni…¨~…ģ…ômakan naŇčra , nikao~urira , o~u mańß…ôr…ôkaj to~u , o~u paka…ĺif…ôtaj to~u fana ° to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u j…ôn- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u , o~u ma…ĺapasifana °aj to~u i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan , ¶aajaj kataŇčasa ko~u pirik…ô ¶ ko~u patano~ukto~uk no~u j…ôn- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u wo~uj-j…ôn-ńßo~uj no~u mita , …¨~…ģo~u Ē…¨~…ģo~u saan to~uno~u nis…ôt…ôkan no~u ¶ijaw-i-po~u~u a …¨~…ģ…ômak , ¶aajajńßo~u pakamo~u~u…ô ¶…ô…ĺ paka…ĺif…ôt to~u ńßańßa…¨~…ģ…ômak…ôn i tini a mipa °a…¨~…ģiŇč to~u sa…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ no~u j…ôn- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u to~u kio~ujiko~u~u , awaajaj ko~u no~u nijańß a °i ¶…ô…ĺ a …ĺa…ĺan a miso~u…ĺiŇča ° a patir…ôŇč to~u ńßamamami…¨~…ģipo~u~ut to~u pasifana °aj i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan . o~u to~umir…ôŇčaj i °a °ajaw no~u kio~ujiko~u i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan , i nijaro~u ° i , o~u pasifana °aj , n…ôŇčn…ôŇč ńßan ko~u sifo~u no~u tajwan , ¶aŇčo~u °o~utaj ko~u pipa °a…¨~…ģiŇčan , ¶aŇčo~u °o~utaj ko~u pa…ĺańß…ô ¶iaj to~u sa…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ i ka…ĺo~u…¨~…ģ…ômak , ¶aŇčo~u °o~utaj ko~u so~u…ĺiŇča ° no~u pa ¶a °o~ufaj to~u Ňčińßa no~u i °a °ajawaj a pasifana °aj , o~u kasinia…¨~…ģa °an to~u ko~u tir…ôŇč ato~u paro~u no~u …ĺo~uma ° ato~u °o~urip no~u pasifana °aj . misa ¶ika ¶ikaj ¶aŇčra a mirawo~u…¨~…ģ to~u ko~unko~uan , ka…ĺińßanawan to~u ko~u rakat i …ĺa…ĺa…ĺa…ĺan to~u ro~umi °ami °a…¨~…ģ , i tato~ukian taŇčasa i pipasifana °an a ko~unko~uan a pasifana ° to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ ato~u so~u~uwa…ĺ no~u jin- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u i wawawawaan sa no~u mita , o~u itiraaj to~u i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan a siŇčsi no~u tajwan i , ¶aaj ka i mata naŇčra ko~u pasifana °aj no~u jin- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u , ¶i fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ¶aŇčra o~u jin- ¶o~u~u-miŇč:- ¶o~u~u i saan , ¶aajaj kamipa…¨~…ģaŇč a misa °o~up a mi °o~u ¶o~u…ĺ to~u wawa no~u jin- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u a papinanam , o~urat…ôk i mafo~u~u °o~ut no~u siŇčsi naŇčra i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan , o~u …ĺat…ôk i ma…ĺata °o~u ¶o~uran no~u siŇčsi naŇčra a mataja…ĺ , o~u ro~uma i o~u mio~u~un…¨~…ģo~uaj ko~u wawa no~u mita i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan , ¶…ô ¶aj a …ĺipaj s…ôpat a po~u…ĺo~u °no~u tato~ukian ko~u pinanaman no~u wawa no~u mita i , matato~u…¨~…ģo~u~uŇč to~u mańßa…ônaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak i , i ¶o~u~u:wańßo~u a minanam ko~u wawa no~u mita , pakajni i ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ , pakajni i so~u~uwa…ĺ , pakajni i s…ôraŇčawan , ¶i fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ¶i ¶…ô…¨~…ģi a ¶a ko~u ma…ĺo~upasifana °aj no~u mita a mi…¨~…ģ…ômak, °araw ńßan awa sa ¶a ko~u pita…¨~…ģi…ô ¶an sano~u pako~u~ujo~u ¶ sato~u ko~u pasifana °aj no~u jin- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan , ano~u itini a ¶a i nijaro~u ° i , mańßa…ônaj a ¶a ko~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° no~u mama ato~u ina no~u wawa no~u mita . nanaj ńßa…ôn…ôn no~u mita ko~u °i ¶…ô…ĺ no~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ita a mi…¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~u Ē to~u pisa…ĺanano~um no~u mato~u °asaj iti:jańßo~u, ko~u pi…¨~…ģ…ômak no~u mita to~u rajraj a …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u jin- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u , ta nanit…ôra ° ta…ĺato~u…ĺis ma…ĺasa ¶iŇča ¶iŇča ta awaaj to~u ko~u ma…ĺawaaj a …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ…ômak…ôn , o~u kasapaanto~u no~u tajwan a tam…¨~…ģaw kita .
S.FORM: == Pilifet to fana' to suwal no Yincumincu == Iti:ya ho , misafacalho ko matoa'say , ano misanga' to lalan no salananoman no omah i , nanitira i tatapangan no tukus a misitapang a palafanaw , ta misulinga' to a mikarkar a misakengkeng a miropay to halalan no nanom a sera, do^do han nangra ko 'apilis no 'alo ato tono' a misalalan . ano taharifa to 'ongcoy i , ano awa'ay to ko pakayraan to halalan i , makakutakutay a mipehpeh toya 'ongcoy ato mi'orong a mifalah toya napehpehan a fakeloh,caayay katalaw cangra to cidal ato 'orad , caayay karorayen cangra to romi'ami'ad a tayal , tangasa i kanga'ayan no nanom a romakat , ta palaheci a misalalan tangasa i omaomahan. Mahaenay ko pinangan no mato'asay no mita itiya:ay ho, a mapapalipaliw a madadadama a miliyaw a miliyaw ko demak nangra , ta ira ko kakaenen no mita i matini . 'Araw han no mita i matini , pakayniay i pipalowad to sowal ato tilid no Yen-Cu-Ming-Cu hananay a demak i , saka lima to a mihecaan a milifet to fana' to sowal no Yen-Cu-Ming-Cu , malowan a malowan ko panganganay a finacadan a miseking , maserer a maserer ko pakalifetay to fana', i tini sca i mitiliday ho i pitilidan a kaemangay no mita mahaen aca , o haharatengen no mita ko mahaenay a demak a misakimokimor a mikingkiw. O Yen-Cu-Ming-Cu Wot-Yen-Hoy no mita i , so'elin to , adihayay to ko naikoran no demak nangra , pakayni i pipalowad to serangawan no mita , caayay to katararikor ko faloco' ato pinangan nangra , tadamihayi kako to nidemakan nangra , nikaorira , o maherekay to , o pakalifetay to fana' to sowal no Yen-Cu-Ming-Cu , o malapasifana'ay to i pitilidan a finacadan , caayay katangasa ko pirikec ko patanoktok no Yen-Cu-Ming-Cu Woy-Yen-Hoy no mita , do^do saan tono nisetekan no Ciyaw-I-Pu a demak , caayayho pakamuecel pakalifet to hahademaken i tini a mipa'ading to salongoc no Yen-Cu-Ming-Cu to kioyiku , awaayay ko no niyah a 'icel a lalan a misolinga' a patireng to hamamamidiput to pasifana'ay i pitilidan . O tomirengay i 'a'ayaw no kioyiko i pitilidan , i niyaro' i , o pasifana'ay , nengneng han ko sifo no Taywan , cango'otay ko pipa'adingan , cango'otay ko palaheciay to salongoc i kalodemak , cango'otay ko solinga' no paca'ofay to ngiha no i 'a'ayaway a pasifana'ay , o kasiniada'an to ko tireng ato paro no loma' ato 'orip no pasifana'ay . Misacikacikay cangra a mirawod to konkoan , kalihanawan to ko rakat i lalalalan to romi'ami'ad , i tatokian tangasa i pipasifana'an a konkoan a pasifana' to tilid ato suwal no Yin-Cu-Ming-Cu i wawawawaan sa no mita , o itiraay to i pitilidan a singsi no Taywan i , caay ka i mata nangra ko pasifana'ay no Yin-Cu-Ming-Cu , ci faloco' cangra o Yin-Cu-Ming:-Cu i saan , caayay kamipadang a misa'op a mi'ocol to wawa no Yin-Cu-Ming-Cu a papinanam , oratek i mafu'ot no singsi nangra i pitilidan , o latek i malata'ocoran no singsi nangra a matayal , o roma i o miundoay ko wawa no mita i pitilidan , cecay a lipay sepat a polo'no tatokian ko pinanaman no wawa no mita i , matatodung to mahaenay a demak i , icu:waho a minanam ko wawa no mita , pakayni i tilid , pakayni i suwal , pakayni i serangawan , ci faloco'ci cedi aca ko malopasifana'ay no mita a midemak,'araw han awa saca ko pitadiecan sano pakuyoc sato ko pasifana'ay no Yin-Cu-Ming-Cu i pitilidan , ano itini aca i niyaro' i , mahaenay aca ko faloco' no mama ato ina no wawa no mita . Nanay haenen no mita ko 'icel no faloco' ita a midodo^ to pisalananom no mato'asay iti:yaho, ko pidemak no mita to rayray a demak no Yin-Cu-Ming-Cu , ta nanitera' talatolis malasacingacinga ta awaay to ko malawaay a dademaken , o kasapaanto no Taywan a tamdaw kita .

nanitira i tatapaŇčan no~u to~u~uko~u~us a misitapaŇč a pa…ĺafanaw , ta miso~u~u…ĺiŇča ° to~u a mikarkar a misak…ôŇčk…ôŇč a miro~upaj to~u ńßa…ĺa…ĺan no~u nano~um a s…ôra, …¨~…ģo~u Ē…¨~…ģo~u ńßan to~uja °o~uŇč ¶o~uj ato~u mi °o~uro~uŇč a mifa…ĺańß to~uja nap…ôńßp…ôńßan a fak…ô…ĺo~uńß, ¶aajaj kata…ĺaw ¶aŇčra to~u ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ ato~u °o~ura…¨~…ģ , ¶aajaj karo~uraj…ôn ¶aŇčra to~u ro~umi °ami °a…¨~…ģ a taja…ĺ , taŇčasa i kaŇča °ajan no~u nano~um a ro~umakat , ta pa…ĺańß…ô ¶i a misa…ĺa…ĺan taŇčasa i o~umao~umańßan. mańßa…ônaj ko~u pinaŇčan no~u mato~u °asaj no~u mita itija:aj ńßo~u, a mapapa…ĺipa…ĺiw a ma…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģama a mi…ĺijaw a mi…ĺijaw ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak naŇčra , ta ira ko~u kaka…ôn…ôn no~u mita i matini . °araw ńßan no~u mita i matini , pakajniaj i pipa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u so~uwa…ĺ ato~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ no~u j…ôn- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u ńßananaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak i , saka …ĺima to~u a mińß…ô ¶aan a mi…ĺif…ôt to~u fana ° to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u j…ôn- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u , ma…ĺo~uwan a ma…ĺo~uwan ko~u paŇčaŇčanaj a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan a mis…ôkiŇč , mas…ôr…ôr a mas…ôr…ôr ko~u paka…ĺif…ôtaj to~u fana °, i tini s ¶a i miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj ńßo~u i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan a ka…ômaŇčaj no~u mita mańßa…ôn a ¶a , o~u ńßańßarat…ôŇč…ôn no~u mita ko~u mańßa…ônaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak a misakimo~ukimo~ur a mikiŇčkiw. o~u j…ôn- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u wo~ut-j…ôn-ńßo~uj no~u mita i , so~u °…ô…ĺin to~u , a…¨~…ģińßajaj to~u ko~u naiko~uran no~u …¨~…ģ…ômak naŇčra , pakajni i pipa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u s…ôraŇčawan no~u mita , ¶aajaj to~u katarariko~ur ko~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ato~u pinaŇčan naŇčra , ta…¨~…ģamińßaji kako~u to~u ni…¨~…ģ…ômakan naŇčra , nikao~urira , o~u mańß…ôr…ôkaj to~u , o~u paka…ĺif…ôtaj to~u fana ° to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u j…ôn- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u , o~u ma…ĺapasifana °aj to~u i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan , ¶aajaj kataŇčasa ko~u pirik…ô ¶ ko~u patano~ukto~uk no~u j…ôn- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u wo~uj-j…ôn-ńßo~uj no~u mita , …¨~…ģo~u Ē…¨~…ģo~u saan to~uno~u nis…ôt…ôkan no~u ¶ijaw-i-po~u~u a …¨~…ģ…ômak , ¶aajajńßo~u pakamo~u~u…ô ¶…ô…ĺ paka…ĺif…ôt to~u ńßańßa…¨~…ģ…ômak…ôn i tini a mipa °a…¨~…ģiŇč to~u sa…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ no~u j…ôn- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u to~u kio~ujiko~u~u , awaajaj ko~u no~u nijańß a °i ¶…ô…ĺ a …ĺa…ĺan a miso~u…ĺiŇča ° a patir…ôŇč to~u ńßamamami…¨~…ģipo~u~ut to~u pasifana °aj i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan . o~u to~umir…ôŇčaj i °a °ajaw no~u kio~ujiko~u i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan , i nijaro~u ° i , o~u pasifana °aj , n…ôŇčn…ôŇč ńßan ko~u sifo~u no~u tajwan , ¶aŇčo~u °o~utaj ko~u pipa °a…¨~…ģiŇčan , ¶aŇčo~u °o~utaj ko~u pa…ĺańß…ô ¶iaj to~u sa…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ i ka…ĺo~u…¨~…ģ…ômak , ¶aŇčo~u °o~utaj ko~u so~u…ĺiŇča ° no~u pa ¶a °o~ufaj to~u Ňčińßa no~u i °a °ajawaj a pasifana °aj , o~u kasinia…¨~…ģa °an to~u ko~u tir…ôŇč ato~u paro~u no~u …ĺo~uma ° ato~u °o~urip no~u pasifana °aj . misa ¶ika ¶ikaj ¶aŇčra a mirawo~u…¨~…ģ to~u ko~unko~uan , ka…ĺińßanawan to~u ko~u rakat i …ĺa…ĺa…ĺa…ĺan to~u ro~umi °ami °a…¨~…ģ , i tato~ukian taŇčasa i pipasifana °an a ko~unko~uan a pasifana ° to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ ato~u so~u~uwa…ĺ no~u jin- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u i wawawawaan sa no~u mita , o~u itiraaj to~u i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan a siŇčsi no~u tajwan i , ¶aaj ka i mata naŇčra ko~u pasifana °aj no~u jin- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u , ¶i fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ¶aŇčra o~u jin- ¶o~u~u-miŇč:- ¶o~u~u i saan , ¶aajaj kamipa…¨~…ģaŇč a misa °o~up a mi °o~u ¶o~u…ĺ to~u wawa no~u jin- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u a papinanam , o~urat…ôk i mafo~u~u °o~ut no~u siŇčsi naŇčra i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan , o~u …ĺat…ôk i ma…ĺata °o~u ¶o~uran no~u siŇčsi naŇčra a mataja…ĺ , o~u ro~uma i o~u mio~u~un…¨~…ģo~uaj ko~u wawa no~u mita i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan , ¶…ô ¶aj a …ĺipaj s…ôpat a po~u…ĺo~u °no~u tato~ukian ko~u pinanaman no~u wawa no~u mita i , matato~u…¨~…ģo~u~uŇč to~u mańßa…ônaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak i , i ¶o~u~u:wańßo~u a minanam ko~u wawa no~u mita , pakajni i ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ , pakajni i so~u~uwa…ĺ , pakajni i s…ôraŇčawan , ¶i fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ¶i ¶…ô…¨~…ģi a ¶a ko~u ma…ĺo~upasifana °aj no~u mita a mi…¨~…ģ…ômak, °araw ńßan awa sa ¶a ko~u pita…¨~…ģi…ô ¶an sano~u pako~u~ujo~u ¶ sato~u ko~u pasifana °aj no~u jin- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan , ano~u itini a ¶a i nijaro~u ° i , mańßa…ônaj a ¶a ko~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° no~u mama ato~u ina no~u wawa no~u mita . nanaj ńßa…ôn…ôn no~u mita ko~u °i ¶…ô…ĺ no~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ita a mi…¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~u Ē to~u pisa…ĺanano~um no~u mato~u °asaj iti:jańßo~u, ko~u pi…¨~…ģ…ômak no~u mita to~u rajraj a …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u jin- ¶o~u~u-miŇč- ¶o~u~u , ta nanit…ôra ° ta…ĺato~u…ĺis ma…ĺasa ¶iŇča ¶iŇča ta awaaj to~u ko~u ma…ĺawaaj a …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ…ômak…ôn , o~u kasapaanto~u no~u tajwan a tam…¨~…ģaw kita .
